name: Nyonya (Malaysian) Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of the oil over medium heat.
2. Add eggs and fry in an even layer until firm. Remove with a spatula and cut into strips.
3. Add onion to the skillet and cook until golden brown; remove and set aside.
4. Heat the remaining 3 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
5. Add shrimp and fry for one minute. Stir in rice, vegetables, mushrooms, half of the egg strips, the onion, and seasonings.
6. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about 3 minutes. If the rice is too dry, add a little water to adjust the moisture level.
7. Serve on a bed of shredded lettuce and top with remaining egg strips.
Makes 8 servings.
